tasks.name: L0 Covariate Go/No-Go Test
tasks.description: Load iter_004 54-SAE dataset (C3A_saebench_corr.json). Add log(L0) as covariate to partial correlations. Compute partial_corr(absorption, quality | log_width, layer, arch_class, log_L0) for all four quality metrics. This is the critical go/no-go for H1. Exclude SAEs with L0=null (canonical SAEs). Report old vs new partial correlations side by side.
tasks.pass_criteria: At least one quality metric retains |partial_r| > 0.2 after L0 control

visualizations.description: Partial correlations before vs after L0 control for 4 quality metrics

pilot.pass_criteria: At least one quality metric retains |partial_r| > 0.2 after L0 control. Script runs without error on full 54-SAE dataset.

tasks.name: Width-Stratified Correlation Analysis
tasks.description: Partition 54 SAEs into width strata (16k, 65k, 1M). Within each stratum, compute Spearman correlation between absorption and each quality metric. BCa bootstrap 95% CIs (10,000 resamples). Report per-stratum n, rho, CI, p-value. The 1M stratum (L0 range 9-207) has best statistical power.

visualizations.description: Within-width Spearman correlations with bootstrap CIs

pilot.pass_criteria: At least 2 of 3 width strata show Spearman rho with 95% CI excluding 0 for at least one quality metric

tasks.name: Mediation Analysis: L0 -> Absorption -> Quality
tasks.description: Formal mediation analysis testing whether absorption mediates L0's effect on downstream quality. Total effect: quality ~ log(L0) + log(width) + layer. Direct effect: quality ~ log(L0) + absorption + log(width) + layer. Indirect effect with Sobel test and bootstrap CI (10,000 resamples). Report proportion mediated for all four quality metrics.

visualizations.description: Mediation analysis results per quality metric
Mediation path diagram with standardized coefficients

pilot.pass_criteria: Mediation analysis completes without error. At least one metric shows proportion mediated > 0.10 with bootstrap CI excluding 0.

tasks.name: Rosenbaum Sensitivity Analysis with Propensity Matching
tasks.description: Match high-absorption (>0.3) and low-absorption (<0.1) SAEs on width (exact) and L0 (nearest neighbor, caliper 0.2 SD). Wilcoxon signed-rank test on quality differences. Compute Rosenbaum Gamma at which test becomes non-significant. Also compute propensity score matching as robustness check. Report matching quality diagnostics.

visualizations.description: Rosenbaum sensitivity plot: Gamma vs p-value

pilot.pass_criteria: At least 5 matched pairs formed. Gamma > 1.0 (i.e., result is at least nominally significant under no hidden bias).

tasks.name: SCR Suppression Variable Diagnosis
tasks.description: Sequentially add covariates (width-only, layer-only, arch-only, L0-only) and track how SCR partial correlation changes from -0.431 (bivariate) to -0.677 (full partial). Identify which covariate produces the suppression jump. Report full decomposition table.

visualizations.description: SCR partial correlation under sequential covariate addition

pilot.pass_criteria: Script identifies which covariate produces the suppression effect.

tasks.name: Clustered SE Regression for C2C PMI
tasks.description: Rerun iter_004 C2C PMI regression (absorption ~ PMI) with letter-level clustering (26 clusters). Report HC3 and clustered SE side by side. Assess skewness (5.186) and consider beta regression or zero-inflated model. Load iter_004 PMI data from C2C_regression_results.json.

visualizations.description: Regression comparison: OLS vs HC3 vs Clustered SE vs Beta regression

pilot.pass_criteria: Clustered SE regression completes. Report whether HC3 and clustered SE produce materially different conclusions.

tasks.name: Absorption Scaling Surface from SAEBench Data
tasks.description: Download SAEBench precomputed results from HuggingFace (adamkarvonen/sae_bench_results). Extract absorption score, L0, width, layer for 200+ SAEs. Fit GAM: absorption ~ s(log_width) + s(log_L0) + ti(log_width, log_L0) + layer. Test interaction term significance. Generate 2D contour plot. Detect phase boundaries via gradient analysis. Also fit simple linear and additive models as baselines.

visualizations.description: 2D absorption contour plot in (log(width), log(L0)) space
Gradient magnitude surface with phase boundary overlay
Model comparison: linear vs additive vs interaction GAM

pilot.pass_criteria: SAEBench data loads successfully with N >= 100 SAEs having both absorption and L0. Linear model R^2 > 0.15 (scaling surface has structure worth characterizing).

tasks.name: RAVEL Knowledge Probe Training on Gemma 2 2B
tasks.description: Load Gemma 2 2B via TransformerLens. Load RAVEL city dataset. Construct prompt templates for city-country, city-continent, city-language. Extract residual stream activations at layers 8, 12, 17. Train multi-class logistic regression probes (3 seeds, 80/20 split). Quality gate: accuracy >= 85%. Save probe weights for absorption measurement. If model access fails (gated), fall back to GPT-2 Small.

visualizations.description: Probe accuracy per attribute per layer

pilot.pass_criteria: Gemma 2B loads successfully. City-country probe at layer 12 achieves accuracy > 75% on 200 cities. If model access fails, GPT-2 Small probe achieves > 80%.

tasks.name: Cross-Domain Absorption Measurement on Knowledge Hierarchies
tasks.description: Using trained probes from P2_probe_training, measure absorption on RAVEL knowledge hierarchies. For each (layer, width, attribute) combo: k-sparse probing for feature splits, false-negative identification, integrated-gradients ablation. Threshold sweep: cosine in {0.01, 0.025, 0.05, 0.1}, dominance in {0.5, 1.0, 2.0}. Report absorption rate per attribute per layer per width.

visualizations.description: Absorption rates per attribute per layer per SAE width
Absorption rates across domains with shuffled controls

pilot.pass_criteria: Absorption measurement completes for at least 1 layer x 1 width x 1 attribute. Absorption rate > 3% (non-trivial signal) OR < 3% (informative null).

tasks.name: Cross-Domain Controls: Shuffled Hierarchy + Random Probe + First-Letter Baseline
tasks.description: Three control experiments: (1) Shuffled hierarchy: randomize city-attribute mappings, re-measure absorption. Expect < 5%. (2) Random probe direction: use random unit vectors, expect < 5%. (3) First-letter baseline: replicate Chanin first-letter measurement on same SAEs for direct comparison. Report dead feature statistics separately.

visualizations.description: Control experiment absorption rates

pilot.pass_criteria: Shuffled control absorption rate < 10%. Random probe control < 10%. Both significantly lower than real measurement (paired test p < 0.05).

tasks.name: Cross-Domain Absorption Comparison and Hierarchy Sharpness Analysis
tasks.description: Combine results from P2_absorption_measurement and P2_controls. Side-by-side absorption rates: first-letter vs country vs continent vs language. Compute hierarchy sharpness (MI between entity and attribute). Correlate absorption severity with hierarchy sharpness. Run early/late absorption taxonomy on knowledge features with tau sweep 0.2-0.4.

visualizations.description: Cross-domain absorption rates with error bars
Absorption rate vs hierarchy sharpness (MI)

pilot.pass_criteria: Comparison table generated. Hierarchy sharpness computed for all attributes.

tasks.name: Taxonomy Correction with Proper Comparison Tokens
tasks.description: Load iter_004 taxonomy results (C2D_taxonomy.json). For letters with n_comparison_tokens=0, use frequency-matched sampling from same log-frequency band. Rerun Type II classification with corrected baselines. Report corrected combined rate with bootstrap CI. Mark original 92.3% as upper bound. Use GPT-2 Small SAEs (open-model anchor).

visualizations.description: Original vs corrected taxonomy rates
visualizations.x: Absorption Type (Type I, Type II, Chanin)

visualizations.description: Per-letter taxonomy classification with corrected baselines

pilot.pass_criteria: Frequency-matched comparison tokens found for >= 20/26 letters. Corrected Type II rate differs from original by > 5 percentage points.

tasks.name: Phase 1 Synthesis: Confound Resolution Summary
tasks.description: Aggregate all Phase 1 results (go/no-go, width-stratified, mediation, Rosenbaum, SCR suppression, clustered regression). Produce unified summary with H1 verdict. Apply Bradford Hill criteria: strength, consistency, specificity, temporality, biological gradient, plausibility. Generate final Phase 1 figures and tables.

visualizations.description: Bradford Hill criteria assessment for absorption-quality causal claim
Full mediation path diagram with all coefficients

pilot.pass_criteria: All Phase 1 sub-task results loaded. H1 verdict rendered (supported/falsified/mixed).

tasks.name: Final Results Integration and Figure Generation
tasks.description: Combine all phase results into a unified results summary. Generate publication-quality figures for all visualizations. Compute final hypothesis verdicts for H1-H5. Produce machine-readable results.json with all key numbers for the writing stage.

visualizations.description: Hypothesis verdict summary

pilot.pass_criteria: All phase results integrated. All hypothesis verdicts computed.
